nation: Moravian Of The Thames First Nation
economic_notes: First Nation controls 100% of Naahii Inc. (commercial real estate), Naahii Grocery Store Inc. (grocery store, no longer active), and Lunaapeew Developments LP (gas station and Tim Hortons). All three entities accounted for under modified equity method and are not consolidated.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified for two reasons: (1) tangible capital assets acquired prior to 1998 have not been capitalized so amortization and asset values may be understated; (2) investments in Naahii Inc., Naahii Grocery Store Inc., and Lunaapeew Developments LP are accounted for under modified equity method rather than full consolidation as required by Canadian Public Sector Accounting Standards. All three related entities have unaudited financial statements. Combined share of net loss from these entities was $303,468 in 2020. ISC funding total combines Fixed $2,252,491 + Set $35,300 - noting Flexible was nil. Total government transfers estimated from identifiable government sources. OSR estimated as rental, administration, other, and adjustments.
